name: sp_context
description: 查询 SP 项目上下文：项目信息、纹理集、层结构、通道列表。 Use when AI needs to: (1) get project info, (2) list texture sets, (3) inspect layer stack, (4) check channels. Substance Painter only (run_python).
author: ArtClaw
